title: Distant Lands
description: Discover immersive biomes inspired by Brazilian flora, 500+ blocks, Carpenter Table, Hollow Logs, and Crawl for hidden adventures!
body:
Distant Lands is a Minecraft mod that expands world generation with biomes inspired by Brazilian flora and adds over 500 immersive, vanilla-style blocks and items. The mod introduces the Carpenter Table, an advanced crafting block similar to the Stonecutter, which allows players to access all wood-related recipes and create Hollow Logs—logs that can be crawled into to build secret passages, hidden rooms, and creative structures.

It also features the Crawl mechanic, letting players voluntarily lie down and sneak, fully integrated with Hollow Logs and other blocks, adding new layers of exploration, creativity, and immersion. Distant Lands is designed to enhance gameplay while keeping the familiar vanilla aesthetic and mechanics.

For bug reports or crashes, join our Discord community: https://discord.gg/9sQprAne6K

**Required libraries:**

- Terrablender (last versions)
- Oh The Trees You'll Grow (last versions)
- Geckolib (last versions)
